Build your rotation

If you only trust one pair, your rotation is broken. Pick 3 pairs you’d actually train in.

Build Your Rotation

<style>
    :root{
      --bg:#ffffff;
      --text:#0b0b0c;
      --muted:#6b6f76;
      --line:#e7e7ea;
      --card:#ffffff;
      --brand:#3D6E2E; /* RC blue */
      --shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
      --radius:18px;
      --radius-sm:12px;
      --max: 980px;
      --sticky-h: 78px;
      --font: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica;
    }

    *{ box-sizing:border-box; }
    body{
      margin:0;
      font-family:var(--font);
      color:var(--text);
      background:var(--bg);
      -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
      text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;
    }

    /* Container */
    .wrap{
      max-width:var(--max);
      margin:0 auto;
      padding:0 16px 10px;
    }

    /* FULL-BLEED HERO (no padding, 50vh mobile) */
    .heroFull{
      width:100%;
      height:50vh;
      min-height:320px;
      background:
        url("https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0772/2041/3736/files/hf_20260130_062331_aa7e0225-b9eb-4c12-a770-a8dcdf694d681.png?v=1769806348?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=80")
        center/cover no-repeat;
      /* Replace with your drawer image in Shopify */
    }

    /* Make hero truly edge-to-edge even inside max container */
    .heroBleed{
      margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
      margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
      width: 100vw;
    }

    /* Headline block */
    .headlineBlock{
      padding:16px 0 6px;
    }
    h1{
      margin:0;
      font-size:30px;
      line-height:1.05;
      letter-spacing:-.6px;
      font-weight:950;
    }
    .subhead{
      margin:10px 0 0;
      color:var(--muted);
      font-size:14px;
      line-height:1.45;
      max-width:52ch;
    }

    .ctaRow{
      display:flex;
      gap:10px;
      flex-wrap:wrap;
      margin-top:14px;
display:none;
    }
    .btn{
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      gap:10px;
      border-radius:999px;
      padding:14px 16px;
      font-weight:950;
      letter-spacing:.2px;
      font-size:14px;
      border:1px solid transparent;
      text-decoration:none;
      cursor:pointer;
      user-select:none;
      transition:transform .08s ease, filter .12s ease;
    }
    .btn:active{ transform:translateY(1px); }
    .btnPrimary{
      background:var(--brand);
      color:#fff;
      box-shadow: 0 1px 15px rgba(0,123,255,.25);
      flex:1 1 220px;
    }
    .btnGhost{
      background:#fff;
      color:var(--text);
      border-color:var(--line);
      flex:1 1 160px;
    }

    /* WHY SECTION */
    .why{
      margin-top:14px;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius:var(--radius);
      padding:14px;
      background:#fff;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
display:none;
    }
    .why h2{
      margin:0 0 10px;
      font-size:15px;
      font-weight:950;
      letter-spacing:-.2px;
    }
    .bullets{
      display:grid;
      gap:10px;
      margin:0;
      padding:0;
      list-style:none;
    }
    .bullet{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr;
      gap:10px;
      align-items:flex-start;
    }
    .dot{
      width:28px; height:28px;
      border-radius:10px;
      background:rgba(0,123,255,.10);
      border:1px solid rgba(0,123,255,.18);
      display:grid;
      place-items:center;
      color:var(--brand);
      font-weight:950;
      line-height:1;
      margin-top:1px;
    }
    .bullet p{
      margin:0;
      font-size:13px;
      color:var(--muted);
      line-height:1.45;
    }
    .bullet p b{ color:var(--text); font-weight:950; }

    /* SHOP GRID */
    .shop{
      margin-top:18px;
    }
    .shopHeader{
      display:flex;
      align-items:flex-end;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:12px;
      margin-bottom:10px;
    }
    .shopHeader h2{
      margin:0;
      font-size:15px;
      font-weight:950;
      letter-spacing:-.2px;
    }
    .shopHeader .hint{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--muted);
      text-align:right;
    }

    .grid{
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap:12px;
    }
    .card{
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      border-radius:var(--radius);
      overflow:hidden;
      background:var(--card);
      box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      min-height: 285px;
    }
    .cardMedia{
      aspect-ratio: 4/3;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f3f4f6, #eef2ff);
      position:relative;
    }
    .tag{
      position:absolute;
      top:10px; left:10px;
      font-size:11px;
      font-weight:950;
      letter-spacing:.2px;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.86);
      backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
      border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
      padding:6px 8px;
      border-radius:999px;
      color:var(--text);
    }
    .cardBody{
      padding:12px 12px 14px;
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:8px;
      flex:1;
    }
    .name{
      margin:0;
      font-weight:950;
      letter-spacing:-.2px;
      font-size:13px;
      line-height:1.2;
    }
    .metaRow{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:8px;
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--muted);
    }
    .stars{
      font-weight:950;
      color:var(--text);
    }
    .price{
      font-weight:950;
      color:var(--text);
    }
    .micro{
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--muted);
      line-height:1.35;
      margin:0;
    }
    .cardActions{
      margin-top:auto;
      display:flex;
      gap:8px;
      align-items:center;
    }
    .add{
      width:100%;
      border-radius:12px;
      padding:12px 10px;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background:#fff;
      font-weight:950;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .addPrimary{
      background: var(--text);
      color:#fff;
      border-color: transparent;
    }
    .sold{
      opacity:.55;
      pointer-events:none;
    }

    /* REVIEWS */
    .reviews {
    margin-top: 10px;
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0;
}
    .reviewsTop{
      display:block;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:10px;
      margin-bottom:10px;
    }
    .reviewsTop h2, .rc-title {
    margin: auto;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 950;
    letter-spacing: -.2px;
    text-align: center;
text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 22px;
	width:80vw;
}
    .ratingPill {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
    text-align: center;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}
    .reviewList{
      display:grid;
      gap:5px;
      margin:0;
      padding:0;
      list-style:none;
    }
    .review{
      padding:12px;
      border-radius:14px;
      background:#fafafb;
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      color:var(--muted);
      font-size:13px;
      line-height:1.45;
   gap:5px;
    }
    .review b {
    color: var(--text);
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
}
    .reviewsFooter{
      margin-top:12px;
      display:flex;
      justify-content:flex-start;
    }
    .linkBtn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    font-weight: 950;
    font-size: 13px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--text);
    text-decoration: none;
    margin: auto;
    width: 80vw;
    color:white;
    background: #3D6E2E;
}

    /* FAQ */
    .faq {
    margin-top: 18px;
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0;
}
    details{
      border-radius:14px;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    details + details{ margin-top:6px; }
    summary{
      list-style:none;
      cursor:pointer;
      padding:14px 12px;
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:10px;
      font-weight:950;
      font-size:13px;
      background:#fafafb;
      
      border-radius:14px;
    }
    summary::-webkit-details-marker{ display:none; }
    .chev{
      width:10px; height:10px;
      border-right:2px solid var(--muted);
      border-bottom:2px solid var(--muted);
      transform:rotate(45deg);
      transition:transform .12s ease;
      margin-left:auto;
      flex:0 0 auto;
    }
    details[open] summary .chev{ transform:rotate(-135deg); }
    .faqBody{
      padding:0 12px 14px;
      color:var(--muted);
      font-size:13px;
      line-height:1.45;
    }

    /* STICKY ROTATION BAR (kept) */
    .sticky{
      position:fixed;
      left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
      z-index:50;
      background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
      backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
      border-top:1px solid var(--line);
      padding:10px 12px;
    }
    .sticky__inner{
      max-width:var(--max);
      margin:0 auto;
      display:flex;
      gap:10px;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      padding:0 4px;
    }
    .progress{
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      gap:6px;
      min-width:0;
      flex:1;
    }
    .progressTop{
      display:flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:space-between;
      gap:10px;
      font-size:12px;
      color:var(--muted);
      white-space:nowrap;
    }
    .progressTop b{ color:var(--text); font-weight:950; }
    .bar{
      width:100%;
      height:10px;
      border-radius:999px;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,.08);
      overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    }
    .barFill{
      width:0%;
      height:100%;
      background: var(--brand);
      border-radius:999px;
    }
    .stickyBtn{
      flex:0 0 auto;
      display:inline-flex;
      align-items:center;
      justify-content:center;
      padding:14px 14px;
      border-radius:14px;
      font-weight:950;
      border:1px solid transparent;
      background: var(--text);
      color:#fff;
      min-width: 132px;
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .stickyBtn[disabled]{
      background: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
      cursor:not-allowed;
    }

    /* Larger screens */
    @media (min-width: 860px){
      .heroFull{ height:56vh; min-height:420px; }
      h1{ font-size:40px; }
      .grid{ grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
      .card{ min-height: 310px; }
    }

    html{ scroll-behavior:smooth; }
  </style>

<style>
/* ===== Base ===== */
.rc-rotation{
  --rc-text:#0b0b0c;
  --rc-muted:#6b6f76;
  --rc-line:#e7e7ea;
  --rc-brand:#3D6E2E;
  --rc-radius:16px;

  font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica;
  color:var(--rc-text);
}

.rc-inner{
  max-width:980px;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:0;
margin-top:10px;
}

.rc-title{
  font-size:22px;
margin-bottom:10px;
display:none;
}

.rc-sub{
  margin:0 0 12px;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--rc-muted);
  line-height:1.35;
  max-width:70ch;
display:none;
}

.rc-status{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fafafb;
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:10px 12px;
  color:var(--rc-muted);
  font-size:13px;
  line-height:1.35;
  margin:10px 0 14px;
display:none;
}

/* ===== Grid ===== */
.rc-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:5px;
}
@media (min-width: 860px){
  .rc-grid{ grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); }
}

.rc-card{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  border-radius:var(--rc-radius);
  overflow:hidden;
  background:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.04);
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  min-height: auto;
}

.rc-media{ display:block; text-decoration:none; color:inherit; background:#f3f4f6; }
.rc-img{ width:100%; aspect-ratio:4/3; object-fit:cover; display:block; background:#f3f4f6; }

.rc-body{
  padding:8px;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  gap:10px;
  flex:1;
background: #fbfbfb;
}
.rc-top{
  display:block;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:15px;
  align-items:flex-start;
}
.rc-name{
  margin:0;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:950;
  letter-spacing:-.2px;
  line-height:1.2;
text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin: .0em 0;
    text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
}
.rc-price{
  margin:0;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:950;
  white-space:nowrap;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin: .0em 0;
    text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
	opacity: .8;
margin-top:10px;
}

.rc-actions{
  display:grid;
  gap:8px;
  margin-top:auto;
}

.rc-btn{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  width:100%;
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:12px 10px;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:950;
  text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid transparent;
  cursor:pointer;
  user-select:none;
  background:#3D6E2E;
text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weightA: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin: .0em 0;
    text-transform: var(--FONT-UPPERCASE-HEADING, none);
    align-items: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
}
.rc-btn--ghost{ border-color:var(--rc-line); color:white; }
.rc-btn--dark{ background:var(--rc-text); color:#fff; }
.rc-btn[disabled]{ opacity:.55; cursor:not-allowed; }

.rc-btn--selected{
  background: rgba(0,123,255,.10);
  border-color: rgba(0,123,255,.35);
}

/* ===== Sticky ===== */
.rc-sticky{
  position:fixed;
  left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
  z-index:9998;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-top:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  padding:10px 12px;
}
.rc-sticky__inner{
  max-width:980px;
  margin:0 auto;
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 4px;
}
.rc-progress{ flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:6px; min-width:0; }
.rc-progressTop{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:10px;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--rc-muted);
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.rc-progressTop b{ color:var(--rc-text); font-weight:950; }

.rc-bar{
  width:100%;
  height:10px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  overflow:hidden;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.rc-barFill{
  width:0%;
  height:100%;
  background: var(--rc-brand);
  border-radius:999px;
}

.rc-stickyBtn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:14px 14px;
  border-radius:14px;
  font-weight:950;
  border:1px solid transparent;
  background: var(--rc-text);
  color:#fff;
  min-width:140px;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.rc-stickyBtn[disabled]{
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
  cursor:not-allowed;
}

/* ===== Modal ===== */
.rc-modalOverlay{
  position:fixed;
  inset:0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.55);
  z-index:9999;
  display:none;
  padding:14px;
}
.rc-modalOverlay.is-open{
  display:flex;
  align-items:flex-end;
  justify-content:center;
}
@media(min-width:860px){
  .rc-modalOverlay.is-open{ align-items:center; }
}

.rc-modal{
  width:100%;
  max-width:640px;
  background:#fff;
  border-radius:18px;
  overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);
}

.rc-modal__top{
  display:flex;
  gap:12px;
  padding:12px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
}
.rc-modal__title{ margin:0; font-size:14px; font-weight:950; letter-spacing:-.2px; line-height:1.2; }
.rc-modal__sub{ margin:4px 0 0; font-size:12px; color:var(--rc-muted); line-height:1.35; }

.rc-x{
  width:38px;
  height:38px;
  border-radius:12px;
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fff;
  cursor:pointer;
  display:grid;
  place-items:center;
  font-weight:950;
}

.rc-modal__body{
  padding:12px;
  display:grid;
  gap:10px;
}

.rc-fitNoteModal{
  border:1px solid rgba(138,42,42,.25);
  background: rgba(138,42,42,.08);
  color:#7c1f1f;
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:10px 12px;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:900;
  line-height:1.3;
}

.rc-selectedList{
  display:grid;
  gap:8px;
}

.rc-selItem{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:10px;
  background:#fff;
  display:grid;
  gap:8px;
}

.rc-selTop{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:10px;
  align-items:flex-start;
}

.rc-selTitle{
  margin:0;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:950;
  letter-spacing:-.2px;
  line-height:1.15;
}

.rc-selMeta{
  margin-top:6px;
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.rc-miniLink{
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:950;
  color:var(--rc-text);
  text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fff;
  padding:8px 10px;
  border-radius:10px; /* not pill */
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
}
.rc-pickedHint{
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--rc-muted);
  font-weight:900;
}

.rc-remove{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fff;
  border-radius:12px;
  padding:8px 10px;
  font-weight:950;
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:12px;
  white-space:nowrap;
}

.rc-sizesRow{
  display:flex;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap:6px;
}

.rc-sizeBtn{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fff;
  color:var(--rc-text);
  border-radius:10px; /* tight, not pill */
  padding:9px 10px;
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:950;
  cursor:pointer;
  line-height:1;
}
.rc-sizeBtn[disabled]{ opacity:.45; cursor:not-allowed; }
.rc-sizeBtn.is-picked{
  border-color: rgba(0,123,255,.55);
  background: rgba(0,123,255,.10);
}

/* Apply all at bottom */
.rc-applyAll{
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fafafb;
  border-radius:14px;
  padding:10px 12px;
  display:grid;
  gap:10px;
}
.rc-applyAll__row{
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  align-items:flex-start;
}
.rc-applyAll__row input{
  margin-top:3px;
  width:18px;
  height:18px;
}
.rc-applyAll__label{
  display:grid;
  gap:2px;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--rc-muted);
  font-weight:900;
}
.rc-applyAll__label b{
  color:var(--rc-text);
  font-weight:950;
}
.rc-applyAll__hint{
  font-weight:800;
  opacity:.9;
}

.rc-applyAll select{
  width:100%;
  border-radius:12px;
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  padding:10px;
  font-weight:950;
  background:#fff;
}

.rc-smallLink{
  font-size:12px;
  font-weight:950;
  color:var(--rc-text);
  text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  background:#fff;
  padding:12px 10px;
  border-radius:14px;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:center;
  align-items:center;
}

/* Footer */
.rc-modal__footer{
  padding:12px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--rc-line);
  display:grid;
  gap:8px;
}

/* Toast */
.rc-toast{
  position:fixed;
  left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  bottom:92px;
  z-index:10000;
  background:rgba(17,18,20,.92);
  color:#fff;
  padding:10px 12px;
  border-radius:999px;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:900;
  max-width: calc(100vw - 24px);
  white-space:nowrap;
  overflow:hidden;
  text-overflow:ellipsis;
  display:none;
}
.rc-toast.is-show{ display:block; }

/* Default hidden */
.rc-rotation .rc-grid [data-add-rot],
.rc-rotation .rc-grid button[data-add-rot],
.rc-rotation .rc-sticky{
  display:none;
}

/* Turn on UI when wrapper has .rc-show-rotation-ui */
.rc-rotation.rc-show-rotation-ui .rc-grid [data-add-rot],
.rc-rotation.rc-show-rotation-ui .rc-grid button[data-add-rot],
.rc-rotation.rc-show-rotation-ui .rc-sticky{
  display:flex;
}

/* make sure button display is right */
.rc-rotation.rc-show-rotation-ui .rc-grid button[data-add-rot]{
  display:flex;
}

.sticky{display:none;}

</style>



  <!-- Full-bleed hero image (no overlay text) -->
  <div class="heroBleed">
    <div class="heroFull" aria-label="Hero image"></div>
  </div>

  <main class="wrap">

    <!-- Headline + buttons -->
    <section class="headlineBlock">
      <h1>Build your rotation</h1>
      <p class="subhead">
        Buy Any 2 Shorts Get 1 Free.
      </p>

      <div class="ctaRow">
        <a class="btn btnPrimary" href="#shop">Build Your Rotation</a>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- WHY (kept, adjusted title) -->
    <section class="why" aria-label="Why golfers build a rotation">
      <h2>Why golfers build a rotation with Golf Print Club gear</h2>
      <ul class="bullets">
        <li class="bullet">
          <div class="dot">1</div>
          <p><b>Same fit across every pair</b> — no guessing, no “this one fits weird.”</p>
        </li>
        <li class="bullet">
          <div class="dot">2</div>
          <p><b>Different designs for different days</b> — fresh feel without switching brands.</p>
        </li>
        <li class="bullet">
          <div class="dot">3</div>
          <p><b>Made for real training</b> — workouts, long runs, tournament days, repeats.</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <!-- SHOP GRID -->
    <div class="rc-rotation" id="rcRotation" data-collection-handle="golf-posters" data-hide-tag="hide">
  <div class="rc-inner">
    <h2 class="rc-title">Pick your 3 pairs</h2>
    <p class="rc-sub">
      Tap “Add to rotation” on the pairs you want. Then hit “Add to cart” at the bottom to pick sizes.
    </p>

    <div class="rc-status" id="rcStatus">Loading shorts…</div>
    <div class="rc-grid" id="rcGrid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Sticky -->
  <div class="rc-sticky" aria-label="Rotation progress">
    <div class="rc-sticky__inner">
      <div class="rc-progress">
        <div class="rc-progressTop">
          <span><b>Rotation:</b> <span id="rcCount">0</span>/3</span>
          <span id="rcSubline">Add 3 pairs</span>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-bar" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rc-barFill" id="rcBarFill"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="rc-stickyBtn" id="rcOpenSizeBtn" type="button" disabled>
        Add to cart
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Modal -->
  <div class="rc-modalOverlay" id="rcModalOverlay" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="rc-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Choose sizes">
      <div class="rc-modal__top">
        <div>
          <p class="rc-modal__title">Choose sizes</p>
          <p class="rc-modal__sub">Pick a size for each pair, then add them to cart.</p>
        </div>
        <button class="rc-x" id="rcModalClose" type="button" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
      </div>

      <div class="rc-modal__body">
        <div id="rcFitNoteModal" class="rc-fitNoteModal" style="display:none;">
          <b>Fit note:</b> LD 4" Golf Posters run about 1 size looser than MD Golf Posters — double-check both size charts.
        </div>

        <div class="rc-selectedList" id="rcSelectedList"></div>

        <div class="rc-applyAll">
          <label class="rc-applyAll__row">
            <input type="checkbox" id="rcApplyAllToggle">
            <span class="rc-applyAll__label">
              <b>Use the same size for all shorts</b>
              <span class="rc-applyAll__hint">Applies anywhere that size is available.</span>
            </span>
          </label>

          <select id="rcApplyAllSelect" disabled>
            <option value="">Select size…</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <a class="rc-smallLink" id="rcSizeChartLink" href="/pages/size-chart" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          View size chart
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="rc-modal__footer">
        <button class="rc-btn rc-btn--dark" id="rcFinalizeAddBtn" type="button" disabled>
          Add selected to cart
        </button>
        <button class="rc-btn rc-btn--ghost" id="rcClearRotationBtn" type="button">
          Clear rotation
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="rc-toast" id="rcToast" role="status" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>
</div>


    <!-- REVIEWS (4–5) + link to all reviews -->
    <section class="reviews" aria-label="Reviews">
  <div class="reviewsTop">
    <h2>Trusted by competitive golfers</h2>
    <div class="ratingPill">★★★★★ 4.9 average</div>
  </div>

  <ul class="reviewList">
    <li class="review">
      <b>“Ordered the RD singlet and the storm golf posters. Both were the perfect fit. And can I say how awesome the design is? Quality products and great networking from the owner!! Keep up the great work”</b> — Richard Conger
    </li>

    <li class="review">
      <b>“Amazing!!!! This is better quality than so many other golf posters, for way less. Awesome!!!”</b> — Simon Menet
    </li>

    <li class="review">

    </li>

    <li class="review">

    </li>

    <li class="review">
      <b>“the most comfortable pairs of shorts i’ve ever ran in!! super good for all sorts of runs and you barely even notice they’re there. highly highly recommend!”</b> — Liam Miller
    </li>
  </ul>

  <div class="reviewsFooter">
    <a class="linkBtn" href="/pages/reviews">View all reviews</a>
  </div>
</section>


    <!-- FAQ (kept) -->
    <section class="faq" id="faq" aria-label="FAQ">
      <details>
        <summary>
          How should these fit?
          <span class="chev"></span>
        </summary>
        <div class="faqBody">
          Snug performance fit. If you’re between sizes or prefer a looser feel, size up. (Replace with your real fit guidance.)
        </div>
      </details>

      <details>
        <summary>
          Shipping & delivery times
          <span class="chev"></span>
        </summary>
        <div class="faqBody">
          Typical processing: 1–2 business days. US delivery: 3–5 business days. (Replace with your real shipping info.)
        </div>
      </details>

      <details>
        <summary>
          Returns & exchanges
          <span class="chev"></span>
        </summary>
        <div class="faqBody">
          Easy returns / exchanges within your return window. (Replace with your policy.)
        </div>
      </details>
    </section>

  </main>

  <!-- Sticky rotation bar (layout only) -->
  <div class="sticky" role="region" aria-label="Rotation progress">
    <div class="sticky__inner">
      <div class="progress">
        <div class="progressTop">
          <span><b>Rotation:</b> 0 / 3 selected</span>
          <span>Unlock free pair</span>
        </div>
        <div class="bar" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="barFill"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="stickyBtn" type="button" disabled>Checkout</button>
    </div>
  </div>
<script>
(() => {
  const root = document.getElementById('rcRotation');
  if (!root) return;

  const collectionHandle = root.getAttribute('data-collection-handle') || 'golf-posters';
  const hideTag = (root.getAttribute('data-hide-tag') || 'hide').toLowerCase();

  const grid = root.querySelector('#rcGrid');
  const statusEl = root.querySelector('#rcStatus');
  const toastEl = root.querySelector('#rcToast');

  // Sticky
  const stickyCountEl = root.querySelector('#rcCount');
  const stickySublineEl = root.querySelector('#rcSubline');
  const stickyFillEl = root.querySelector('#rcBarFill');
  const openSizeBtn = root.querySelector('#rcOpenSizeBtn');

  // Modal
  const overlay = root.querySelector('#rcModalOverlay');
  const closeBtn = root.querySelector('#rcModalClose');
  const selectedList = root.querySelector('#rcSelectedList');
  const sizeChartLink = root.querySelector('#rcSizeChartLink');
  const fitNoteModal = root.querySelector('#rcFitNoteModal');

  const applyAllToggle = root.querySelector('#rcApplyAllToggle');
  const applyAllSelect = root.querySelector('#rcApplyAllSelect');
  const finalizeAddBtn = root.querySelector('#rcFinalizeAddBtn');
  const clearRotationBtn = root.querySelector('#rcClearRotationBtn');

  // Size charts (edit if needed)
  const SIZE_CHART_DEFAULT = '/pages/size-chart';
  const SIZE_CHART_LD_SPLIT = '/pages/4-split-short-sizing';
  const SIZE_CHART_MD_HALF  = '/pages/md-half-tights-sizing'; // change if needed

  const TARGET_COUNT = 3;

  function showToast(msg){
    if (!toastEl) return;
    toastEl.textContent = msg;
    toastEl.classList.add('is-show');
    clearTimeout(window.__rc_toast_timer);
    window.__rc_toast_timer = setTimeout(() => toastEl.classList.remove('is-show'), 1600);
  }

  function setStatus(msg){
    if (!statusEl) return;
    statusEl.textContent = msg;
  }

  function safeTags(tags){
    if (!tags) return [];
    if (Array.isArray(tags)) return tags.map(t => String(t).trim().toLowerCase());
    return String(tags).split(',').map(t => t.trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean);
  }

  function escAttr(str){
    return String(str || '').replaceAll('"','"');
  }

  function anyVariantInStock(p){
    return (p.variants || []).some(v => !!v.available);
  }

  function typeKeyFromProduct(p){
    const title = (p.title || '').toLowerCase();
    const pt = (p.product_type || '').toLowerCase();
    const tags = safeTags(p.tags || []);

    const isLD = tags.includes('ld') || pt.includes('ld') || pt.includes('split') || title.includes('split');
    const isMD = tags.includes('md') || pt.includes('md') || pt.includes('half') || title.includes('half');

    if (isLD) return 'LD_SPLIT';
    if (isMD) return 'MD_HALF';
    return 'OTHER';
  }

  function sizeChartForType(typeKey){
    if (typeKey === 'LD_SPLIT') return SIZE_CHART_LD_SPLIT;
    if (typeKey === 'MD_HALF') return SIZE_CHART_MD_HALF;
    return SIZE_CHART_DEFAULT;
  }

  // ---- SIZE DETECTION (fixes your “color showing instead of size”) ----
  function getOptionsArray(product){
    // products.json usually includes `options` as array of strings, or objects
    const opts = product && product.options ? product.options : [];
    return Array.isArray(opts) ? opts : [];
  }

  function findSizeIndexByName(product){
    const opts = getOptionsArray(product);
    if (!opts.length) return 1;

    // string options: ["Color","Size"]
    if (typeof opts[0] === 'string'){
      const idx = opts.findIndex(o => String(o).toLowerCase().includes('size'));
      return idx >= 0 ? idx + 1 : 0;
    }

    // object options: [{name:"Color",position:1},...]
    if (typeof opts[0] === 'object'){
      const hit = opts.find(o => String(o.name || '').toLowerCase().includes('size'));
      return hit ? Number(hit.position || 1) : 0;
    }

    return 0;
  }

  function looksLikeSizeValue(v){
    const s = String(v || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!s) return false;

    // letter sizes
    if (/^(xxs|xs|s|m|l|xl|xxl|2xl|3xl|4xl|5xl)$/.test(s)) return true;

    // numeric waist sizes like 26, 28, 30, 32...
    if (/^\d{2}$/.test(s)) return true;

    // extended sizes
    if (/^(small|medium|large)$/.test(s)) return true;

    return false;
  }

  function inferSizeIndexByValues(product){
    const variants = product.variants || [];
    if (!variants.length) return 1;

    // Score each option position 1..3 by how often it looks like a size
    const scores = {1:0, 2:0, 3:0};
    for (const v of variants){
      const o1 = v.option1;
      const o2 = v.option2;
      const o3 = v.option3;

      if (looksLikeSizeValue(o1)) scores[1] += 1;
      if (looksLikeSizeValue(o2)) scores[2] += 1;
      if (looksLikeSizeValue(o3)) scores[3] += 1;
    }

    // pick max score
    let best = 1;
    let bestScore = scores[1];

    if (scores[2] > bestScore){ best = 2; bestScore = scores[2]; }
    if (scores[3] > bestScore){ best = 3; bestScore = scores[3]; }

    return best;
  }

  function getSizeIndex(product){
    const byName = findSizeIndexByName(product);
    if (byName) return byName;
    return inferSizeIndexByValues(product);
  }

  function getVariantLabelAtIndex(variant, idx){
    if (idx === 2) return variant.option2 || variant.option1 || variant.title || '';
    if (idx === 3) return variant.option3 || variant.option1 || variant.title || '';
    return variant.option1 || variant.title || '';
  }

  // ===== Rotation state =====
  // item = { key, handle, title, url, img, price, typeKey, variants, sizeIndex, pickedVariantId, pickedSize }
  const rotation = [];
  let globalSize = '';

  function updateSticky(){
    const count = rotation.length;

    stickyCountEl.textContent = String(count);

    const pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((count / TARGET_COUNT) * 100));
    stickyFillEl.style.width = pct + '%';

    if (count === 0){
      stickySublineEl.textContent = `Add ${TARGET_COUNT} pairs`;
      openSizeBtn.disabled = true;
    } else if (count < TARGET_COUNT){
      stickySublineEl.textContent = `Add ${TARGET_COUNT - count} more`;
      openSizeBtn.disabled = false;
    } else {
      stickySublineEl.textContent = `Ready`;
      openSizeBtn.disabled = false;
    }
  }

  function updateFitNoteVisibility(){
    const hasLD = rotation.some(i => i.typeKey === 'LD_SPLIT');
    const hasMD = rotation.some(i => i.typeKey === 'MD_HALF');
    fitNoteModal.style.display = (hasLD && hasMD) ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  function updateCardSelectedState(handle, isSelected){
    const btn = root.querySelector(`[data-add-rot="${CSS.escape(handle)}"]`);
    if (!btn) return;
    btn.classList.toggle('rc-btn--selected', isSelected);
    btn.textContent = isSelected ? 'Added to rotation' : 'Add to rotation';
  }

  function addToRotation(product){
    if (rotation.some(i => i.handle === product.handle)){
      showToast('Already in rotation');
      return;
    }
    if (rotation.length >= TARGET_COUNT){
      showToast(`Rotation is ${TARGET_COUNT} pairs`);
      return;
    }

    const url = `/products/${product.handle}`;
    const img = (product.images && product.images[0] && product.images[0].src) ? product.images[0].src : '';
    const price = (product.variants && product.variants[0] && product.variants[0].price) ? ('$' + product.variants[0].price) : '';
    const typeKey = typeKeyFromProduct(product);
    const sizeIndex = getSizeIndex(product);

    rotation.push({
      key: String(Date.now() + Math.random()),
      handle: product.handle,
      title: product.title,
      url,
      img,
      price,
      typeKey,
      variants: (product.variants || []).slice(),
      sizeIndex,
      pickedVariantId: null,
      pickedSize: null
    });

    updateCardSelectedState(product.handle, true);
    updateSticky();
    showToast('Added');
  }

  function removeFromRotation(key){
    const idx = rotation.findIndex(i => i.key === key);
    if (idx === -1) return;

    const removed = rotation[idx];
    rotation.splice(idx, 1);

    updateCardSelectedState(removed.handle, false);

    // if global size no longer valid anywhere, clear it
    rebuildApplyAllOptions();

    renderSelectedList();
    updateSticky();
    updateFitNoteVisibility();
  }

  function clearRotation(){
    rotation.forEach(i => updateCardSelectedState(i.handle, false));
    rotation.length = 0;

    globalSize = '';
    applyAllToggle.checked = false;
    applyAllSelect.value = '';
    applyAllSelect.disabled = true;

    renderSelectedList();
    updateSticky();
    updateFitNoteVisibility();
    finalizeAddBtn.disabled = true;
    showToast('Cleared');
  }

  function rebuildApplyAllOptions(){
    const sizes = new Set();
    rotation.forEach(item => {
      item.variants.filter(v => v.available).forEach(v => {
        sizes.add(getVariantLabelAtIndex(v, item.sizeIndex));
      });
    });

    const list = Array.from(sizes).filter(Boolean);

    applyAllSelect.innerHTML =
      `<option value="">Select size…</option>` +
      list.map(s => `<option value="${escAttr(s)}">${s}</option>`).join('');

    if (globalSize && !list.includes(globalSize)){
      globalSize = '';
      applyAllSelect.value = '';
    } else if (globalSize){
      applyAllSelect.value = globalSize;
    }
  }

  function applyGlobalSize(){
    if (!applyAllToggle.checked || !globalSize) return;
    rotation.forEach(item => {
      const match = item.variants.find(v => v.available && getVariantLabelAtIndex(v, item.sizeIndex) === globalSize);
      if (match){
        item.pickedVariantId = Number(match.id);
        item.pickedSize = globalSize;
      }
    });
  }

  function updateFinalizeState(){
    const allPicked = rotation.length > 0 && rotation.every(i => !!i.pickedVariantId);
    finalizeAddBtn.disabled = !allPicked;
  }

  function renderSelectedList(){
    selectedList.innerHTML = '';

    if (rotation.length === 0){
      selectedList.innerHTML = `<div class="rc-status">No pairs selected yet.</div>`;
      finalizeAddBtn.disabled = true;
      return;
    }

    updateFitNoteVisibility();
    rebuildApplyAllOptions();
    applyGlobalSize();

    // Set top size chart link to first item by default
    sizeChartLink.href = sizeChartForType(rotation[0].typeKey);

    rotation.forEach(item => {
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'rc-selItem';

      const pickedText = item.pickedSize ? `Selected: <b>${item.pickedSize}</b>` : `Select a size`;

      const sizeButtons = item.variants
        .slice()
        .sort((a,b)=> Number(b.available) - Number(a.available))
        .map(v => {
          const label = getVariantLabelAtIndex(v, item.sizeIndex);
          const disabled = !v.available;
          const picked = item.pickedVariantId === Number(v.id);

          return `
            <button
              type="button"
              class="rc-sizeBtn ${picked ? 'is-picked' : ''}"
              data-pick="1"
              data-item="${item.key}"
              data-variant="${v.id}"
              data-size="${escAttr(label)}"
              ${disabled ? 'disabled' : ''}
            >${label}</button>
          `;
        }).join('');

      card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="rc-selTop">
          <div>
            <p class="rc-selTitle">${item.title}</p>
            <div class="rc-selMeta">
              <a class="rc-miniLink" href="${sizeChartForType(item.typeKey)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Size chart</a>
              <span class="rc-pickedHint">${pickedText}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button class="rc-remove" type="button" data-remove="${item.key}">Remove</button>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-sizesRow">${sizeButtons}</div>
      `;

      selectedList.appendChild(card);
    });

    updateFinalizeState();
  }

  function openModal(){
    // only open if at least 1 selected
    if (!rotation.length) return;

    renderSelectedList();

    overlay.classList.add('is-open');
    overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');
  }

  function closeModal(){
    overlay.classList.remove('is-open');
    overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
  }

  // ===== Events =====
  openSizeBtn.addEventListener('click', openModal);
  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) closeModal(); });

  clearRotationBtn.addEventListener('click', clearRotation);

  applyAllToggle.addEventListener('change', () => {
    applyAllSelect.disabled = !applyAllToggle.checked;
    if (!applyAllToggle.checked){
      globalSize = '';
      applyAllSelect.value = '';
    } else {
      globalSize = applyAllSelect.value || '';
    }
    renderSelectedList();
  });

  applyAllSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
    globalSize = applyAllSelect.value || '';
    renderSelectedList();
  });

  selectedList.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const rm = e.target.closest('[data-remove]');
    if (rm){
      removeFromRotation(rm.getAttribute('data-remove'));
      return;
    }

    const pick = e.target.closest('[data-pick="1"]');
    if (pick){
      const itemKey = pick.getAttribute('data-item');
      const variantId = pick.getAttribute('data-variant');
      const sizeLabel = pick.getAttribute('data-size');

      const item = rotation.find(i => i.key === itemKey);
      if (!item) return;

      item.pickedVariantId = Number(variantId);
      item.pickedSize = sizeLabel;

      // Update main chart link to this item's chart
      sizeChartLink.href = sizeChartForType(item.typeKey);

      // If apply-all is enabled, set global size to this
      if (applyAllToggle.checked){
        globalSize = sizeLabel;
        applyAllSelect.value = sizeLabel;
      }

      renderSelectedList();
      return;
    }
  });

  finalizeAddBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!rotation.length) return;
    if (rotation.some(i => !i.pickedVariantId)) return;

    const items = rotation.map(i => ({ id: Number(i.pickedVariantId), quantity: 1 }));

    const res = await fetch('/cart/add.js', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{ 'Content-Type':'application/json', 'Accept':'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ items })
    });

    if (!res.ok){
      showToast('Could not add to cart. Try again.');
      return;
    }

    showToast('Added to cart');
    window.location.href = '/cart';
  });

  // ===== Render product cards =====
  function renderProductCard(p){
    const url = `/products/${p.handle}`;
    const img = (p.images && p.images[0] && p.images[0].src) ? p.images[0].src : '';
    const price = (p.variants && p.variants[0] && p.variants[0].price) ? ('$' + p.variants[0].price) : '';

    const card = document.createElement('article');
    card.className = 'rc-card';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <a class="rc-media" href="${url}">
        ${img ? `<img class="rc-img" src="${img}" alt="${escAttr(p.title)}" loading="lazy">` : `<div class="rc-img"></div>`}
      </a>
      <div class="rc-body">
        <div class="rc-top">
          <p class="rc-name">${p.title}</p>
          <p class="rc-price">${price}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="rc-actions">
          <a class="rc-btn rc-btn--ghost" href="${url}">View product</a>
          <button class="rc-btn rc-btn--ghost" type="button" data-add-rot="${p.handle}">Add to rotation</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

    const addBtn = card.querySelector(`[data-add-rot="${CSS.escape(p.handle)}"]`);
    addBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      addToRotation(p);
    });

    return card;
  }

  async function init(){
    setStatus('Loading shorts…');

    const res = await fetch(`/collections/${encodeURIComponent(collectionHandle)}/products.json?limit=250`, {
      headers:{ 'Accept':'application/json' }
    });

    if (!res.ok){
      setStatus('Could not load collection. Check the collection handle.');
      return;
    }

    const data = await res.json();
    let products = (data.products || []);

    // remove hide
    products = products.filter(p => !safeTags(p.tags).includes(hideTag));

    // only in-stock
    products = products.filter(p => anyVariantInStock(p));

    if (!products.length){
      grid.innerHTML = '';
      setStatus('No in-stock products found.');
      updateSticky();
      return;
    }

    setStatus(`${products.length} available — build your rotation.`);
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    products.forEach(p => grid.appendChild(renderProductCard(p)));

    updateSticky();
  }

  init().catch(err => {
    console.error(err);
    setStatus('Could not load products. Check console.');
  });
})();
</script>
